messages.text: Next Contradiction Salon: topic to be announced soon
"The Radical Middle does not mediate between everything. It distinguishes."
New thinking challenge in the Ideas Archive: How does AI change our capacity for judgment?
"Those who use AI only to produce output become replaceable."
The Atelier is looking for fellow thinkers – pull requests welcome!
"Play is not the opposite of seriousness."
"The human cultivates Firstness. AI amplifies Thirdness. Dialogue generates productive Secondness."
New lead essay: The Future of Education – Firstness competence in the AI age
"Protect the Firstness of the human being from its premature translation into mere function."
